findings.title: Non-atomic balance update in bank transfer
findings.description: Read-yield-write on shared struct fields without mutex protection allows concurrent transfers to corrupt balances

findings.title: TOCTOU in ticket booking
findings.description: Availability check and decrement on global variables are not atomic, allowing overselling of tickets

findings.title: Non-atomic shared counter increment
findings.description: Read-yield-write on global counter causes lost updates under concurrent pthread access

findings.title: TOCTOU in inventory order processing
findings.description: Stock check and decrement on global variable are not atomic, allowing inventory to go negative

findings.title: Non-atomic restock update
findings.description: Read-yield-write on inventory_stock races with order processing, causing lost restocks

findings.title: Non-thread-safe singleton config initialization
findings.description: Flag-guarded config initialization without mutex allows multiple allocations, memory leaks, and use of uninitialized data
